title: 4 Pack Artificial Flowers, Light and Dark Pink Peony Fake Flowers, Silk Faux Peonies Artificial Flowers, for Bridal Bouquet, Wedding, Birthday Party, Home Decor, Table Centerpiece
features: FAUX FLOWERS THAT LOOK REAL: These faux flowers are made from high-quality silk fabric, with each peony head full, vibrant and lifelike. The petals are soft and natural to the touch, while the lush green leaves feature clear, realistic veining. A flexible iron wire stem is built in, allowing easy shaping and DIY arrangements—perfect for creating your ideal floral display.

VIBRANT 4-BUNCH SET: Each set includes four artificial flower bunches, and each bunch features 5 large peonies, 4 small flower buds, foam flower spikes, fruits and greenery. When combined, they form a full, eye-catching peony bouquet ideal for any space or event.

LOW MAINTENANCE, LONG-LASTING BEAUTY: These fake flowers are UV resistant and incredibly realistic, requiring no watering, sunlight or trimming. They never wilt or fade, remaining fresh and vibrant all year round. Simply wipe with a damp cloth or blow gently with cool air to remove dust.

VERSATILE INDOOR & OUTDOOR DECOR: Whether it’s indoors—living room, bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, hallway, office or desk—or outdoors like balconies, porches, gardens or patios, Happivue artificial flowers blend seamlessly with any setting. Bring the charm of nature into your home with these delightful artificial flowers for decoration and enjoy a cheerful, refreshing atmosphere every day.

IDEAL FOR VARIOUS OCCASIONS: Silk flowers are a practical and lasting alternative to fresh blooms, especially ideal for those with pollen allergies. Perfect as bridal bouquets, event decor, wedding centrepieces, DIY floral arrangements, or simply to brighten up your everyday space. They also make a meaningful choice as memorial or grave artificial flowers.

PLEASE NOTE:Due to packaging and transport, the artificial flowers may arrive slightly compressed. To restore their full shape, gently fluff them up using a hairdryer or handheld steamer before arranging.
